title: 2 accused of murder appear in George Magistrate's Court
description: GEORGE NEWS - A man and a woman appeared in...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A man and a woman appeared in the George Magistrate’s Court on Monday 29 December, each in connection with a murder charge related to two separate incidents on Christmas day.


> The 36-year-old Medowaan Goldman from Rosemoor, was arrested the day after Christmas.


He is being accused of stabbing his victim, Castro Biko, to death with a knife in the street where he (the accused) lives. He remains in custody.

The woman, Laura Jane Luchrechia Le Kay (23) from Kouwdouw Farm, Waboomskraal, is being accused of killing Brendon Boesak (30) with whom she was in a domestic relationship. According to the charge sheet, the incident resulted from physical / sexual abuse. Le Kay stabbed him to death with a knife on the farm during an argument between them.

Both cases were remanded to 2 January for bail application.

Previous articles:

Woman arrested on murder charge following a man's death in Waboomskraal

Police investigating a murder case following man's death in Rosemoor

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
